text: You welcomed Robert and introduced your colleague.
Now you are all in the meeting room, and you lead the meeting.
In my opinion, it is a good idea.
Good morning. Let us start the meeting. The agenda has two points.
Thank you, Karina. I read the agenda. I am ready to share my idea.
The first point is the new aircraft. What do you think, Robert?
In my opinion, the new aircraft is a very good idea.
I agree with you. Let us make a decision together.
Perfect. This is a good decision. Thank you for the meeting.
Let us make a decision together.

Good morning, everyone. Thank you for coming to the meeting today. Let us start. The agenda has two points. The first point is the new aircraft, and the second point is the visit next month. I want to hear your opinion on each point, so please share your idea when you are ready. We will make a decision together at the end. Robert, what do you think about the first point?

Hello, this is Robert. I read the agenda for the meeting, and I have a clear opinion. In my opinion, the new aircraft is a very good idea. I agree with the plan, and I think it is the right point to start with. I have one small idea for the second point too. I am ready to share it in the meeting, and I am happy to make a decision together. See you in the meeting room.

First, Karina opened the meeting and said let us start. Then she read the agenda with two points. Next, she asked Robert what he thinks about the first point. After that, Robert shared his opinion and said he agrees. Finally, they made a decision together.
In my opinion, it is a good idea.
Let us make a decision together.
